data.name: Splash_ConfiguringServices
data.comment: Splash screen status during DI configuration

data.name: Splash_LoadingSettings
data.comment: Splash screen status during settings load

data.name: Splash_ApplyingLanguage
data.comment: Splash screen status during language application

data.name: Splash_ApplyingTheme
data.comment: Splash screen status during theme application

data.name: Splash_LoadingInterface
data.comment: Splash screen status during main window creation

data.name: MainWindow_Welcome
data.comment: Welcome message displayed on main window

data.name: Dashboard_Repository_Prefix
data.comment: Label prefix for repository path display

data.name: Monitoring_Subtitle
data.value: Track the progress of your current deployment

data.name: Monitoring_NoDeployment
data.comment: Empty state title when no deployment

data.name: Monitoring_NoDeploymentHint
data.value: Start a deployment from the Applications section to monitor it here
data.comment: Empty state hint when no deployment

data.name: Undo_ActionUndone
data.comment: Toast message when action is undone (0=action description)

data.name: Undo_ActionRedone
data.comment: Toast message when action is redone (0=action description)

data.name: Undo_AddApplication
data.comment: Undo description for adding application (0=app name)

data.name: Undo_EditApplication
data.comment: Undo description for editing application (0=app name)

data.name: Undo_DeleteApplication
data.comment: Undo description for deleting application (0=app name)

data.name: Init_ErrorMessage
Apps_Subtitle
data.value: Install, update, and manage your applications

data.name: Search_RecentSearches
data.comment: Header for recent searches in search box

data.name: Deploy_DryRunBanner
data.value: SIMULATION MODE ACTIVE: No changes will be made
data.comment: High visibility banner when dry run is enabled

data.name: Editor_Title_New
data.comment: Profile editor title when creating new

data.name: Editor_Title_Edit
data.comment: Profile editor title when editing (0=profile name)

data.name: Editor_Empty_NoParent
data.comment: Empty state when no parent profile is selected

data.name: Editor_Empty_NoApps
data.comment: Empty state when no apps are added

data.name: Editor_Tooltip_Inherited
data.comment: Tooltip for inherited app lock icon

data.name: Editor_Error_NameRequired
data.comment: Error when profile name is empty

data.name: Editor_Error_LoadParent
data.comment: Error when loading parent profile fails (0=error message)

data.name: Editor_Error_InvalidName
data.comment: Error when profile name has invalid characters

data.name: Editor_Error_SaveFailed
data.comment: Error when saving profile fails (0=error message)

data.name: Editor_Hint_ProfileName
data.comment: Hint text for profile name field

data.name: Dialog_NoAppsAvailable
data.comment: Message when no apps available to add

data.name: Dashboard_NoActivity_Hint
data.value: Deploy a profile to see your history here
data.comment: Empty state hint for recent activity

data.name: Dashboard_QuickActions_Title
data.comment: Title for quick actions section on dashboard

data.name: Settings_ThemeName_Light
data.comment: Theme display name for WPF-UI Light

data.name: Settings_ThemeName_DraculaPro
data.comment: Theme display name for Dracula Pro

data.name: Settings_ThemeName_VanHelsing
data.comment: Theme display name for Van Helsing

data.name: Settings_AutoSaved
data.comment: Toast notification when settings are auto-saved

data.name: Settings_SaveFailed
data.comment: Error shown when settings persistence fails

data.name: Settings_RestartNow
data.comment: Button to restart the application immediately

data.name: Settings_NoErrors
data.comment: Empty state when no errors in history

data.name: Settings_CachePackages
data.comment: Label for number of cached packages

data.name: Settings_CacheHitRate
data.comment: Label for cache hit rate percentage

data.name: Settings_LastRefresh
data.comment: Label for last cache refresh time

data.name: Common_NotAvailable
data.comment: Displayed when data is not available

data.name: Settings_ParallelInstallsApplied
data.value: Parallel installations setting applied (restart views for effect)
data.comment: Status message after changing parallel installs

data.name: Settings_ParallelScans_Desc
data.value: Maximum number of simultaneous application checks

data.name: Settings_ParallelScansApplied
data.value: Parallel scans setting applied (restart views for effect)
data.comment: Status message after changing parallel scans

data.name: Settings_ScanTimeoutApplied
data.comment: Status message after changing scan timeout

data.name: Settings_ScanTimeout_Hint
data.value: Maximum time to wait for update scans (in minutes)
data.comment: Hint text for scan timeout setting

data.name: Settings_Btn_OpenLogs
data.comment: Button to open logs folder in explorer

data.name: Apps_SelectAll
data.comment: Button to select all visible apps

data.name: Apps_SelectNotInstalled
data.comment: Button to select all not installed apps

data.name: Apps_StatusAll
data.comment: Status filter option: show all apps

data.name: Apps_StatusInstalled
data.comment: Status filter option: show installed apps only

data.name: Apps_StatusNotInstalled
data.comment: Status filter option: show not installed apps only

data.name: Apps_StatusSelected
data.comment: Status filter option: show selected apps only

data.name: Apps_ManualInstall
data.comment: Badge for apps requiring manual installation

data.name: Apps_ManualInstallTooltip
data.value: This application requires manual installation from the official website

data.name: Apps_EmptyFilterResults
data.comment: Title when filters produce no results

data.name: Apps_EmptyFilterResultsHint
data.value: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria
data.comment: Hint text when filters produce no results

data.name: Apps_ResetColumns
data.comment: Reset column visibility to default settings

data.name: Status_ManualRequired
data.comment: Status message for manual install apps

data.name: Menu_CopyAppId
data.comment: Context menu: copy application ID to clipboard

data.name: Menu_CopyWingetId
data.comment: Context menu: copy winget package ID to clipboard

data.name: LogViewer_NoLogs
data.comment: Message when no logs are recorded

data.name: Prerequisites_RestartRequired
data.value: Some prerequisites require an application restart to be detected. The PATH environment variable has been updated but will only take effect after restarting.
data.comment: Message shown when restart is required after prerequisites installation

data.name: Prerequisites_RestartApp
data.comment: Button text to restart the application

data.name: Prerequisites_DismissRestart
data.comment: Button text to dismiss restart prompt

data.name: Prerequisites_PageDescription
data.value: Win11Forge requires the following components to be installed for full functionality.

data.name: Prerequisites_InstallAll
data.comment: Install or reinstall all prerequisites button

data.name: Prerequisites_ReinstallTooltip
data.value: Install missing prerequisites or reinstall existing ones

data.name: Prerequisites_ComponentsInstalled
data.comment: Status summary suffix for installed components

data.name: Apps_StatusFavorites
data.comment: Status filter option: show favorite apps only

data.name: Apps_SelectFavorites
data.comment: Button to select all favorite apps

data.name: Dialog_CopyDetails
data.comment: Button to copy error details to clipboard

data.name: Help_Shortcut_GridPage
data.value: Move one page up or down

data.name: Help_Shortcut_GridHomeEnd
data.value: Jump to first or last row

data.name: Deployment_Summary_Installed
data.comment: Result summary suffix for installed count

data.name: Deployment_Summary_Failed
data.comment: Result summary suffix for failed count

data.name: Deployment_Summary_Skipped
data.comment: Result summary suffix for skipped count

data.name: Onboarding_Step1_Desc
data.value: Start by ensuring all required components are installed (Winget, Chocolatey, etc.)

data.name: Onboarding_Step2_Desc
data.value: Explore 100+ applications, mark favorites, and select what you need

data.name: Onboarding_Step3_Desc
data.value: Use deployment profiles for batch installations or install apps individually

data.name: Validation_AlreadyExists
data.value: A profile with this name already exists

data.name: Validation_ProfileNameInvalidChars
data.comment: Profile name invalid characters validation message

data.name: Validation_ProfileNameTooLong
data.value: Profile name must not exceed {0} characters
data.comment: Profile name too long validation message (0=max length)

data.name: Validation_ManualInstallCannotBeSuccess
data.value: Manual install required cannot be marked as success
data.comment: Validation error for InstallResult semantic consistency

data.name: Validation_DryRunShouldSucceed
data.value: Dry run results should always be successful
data.comment: Validation error for InstallResult dry run consistency

data.name: Validation_FailedInstallNeedsMessage
data.value: Failed installation must include an error message
data.comment: Validation error for InstallResult message requirement

data.name: Validation_AppId_Length
data.value: Application ID must be between 1 and 256 characters

data.name: Validation_AppName_Length
data.value: Application name must be between 1 and 512 characters

data.name: Validation_InvalidUrl
data.value: URL must be a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL

data.name: Help_Tooltip_Scan
data.value: Check which applications are installed and detect available updates

data.name: Help_Tooltip_Install
data.value: Install the selected applications using Winget or Chocolatey

data.name: Help_Tooltip_Deploy
data.value: Start installing all applications from the selected profile

data.name: Help_Tooltip_DryRun
data.value: Simulation mode: Preview what would be installed without making changes

data.name: Help_SelectProfile
data.value: Choose a deployment profile that defines which applications to install. Profiles can inherit from other profiles.

data.name: Help_DryRun
data.value: When enabled, the deployment will show what would happen without actually installing anything. Useful for testing profiles.

data.name: Help_Performance
data.value: Adjust parallel operations for optimal performance based on your system resources. Higher values may speed up scans but use more CPU.

data.name: Confirm_ClearHistory_Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear all deployment history? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Confirm_Uninstall_Message_Single
data.value: Are you sure you want to uninstall this application? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Confirm_Uninstall_Message_Multiple
data.value: Are you sure you want to uninstall {0} applications? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Confirm_DeleteProfile_Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this profile? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Export_FileFilter
data.comment: File filter for profile export dialog

data.name: Import_FileFilter
data.comment: File filter for profile import dialog

data.name: Import_Error_Invalid
data.comment: Error when profile file is invalid

data.name: Import_Error_Validation
data.comment: Error when profile validation fails (0=error message)

data.name: Btn_ScanUpdates
data.comment: Button to re-check for available updates on installed apps

data.name: Menu_Update
data.comment: Context menu item to update application

data.name: Menu_Launch
data.comment: Context menu item to launch application

data.name: Menu_Scan
data.comment: Context menu item to scan single application

data.name: Menu_ScanSelected
data.comment: Context menu item to scan only selected applications

data.name: Error_LaunchFailed
data.value: Could not launch {0}. The application may not be installed or the executable was not found.
data.comment: Error when application launch fails (0=app name)

data.name: Apps_StatusHasUpdates
data.comment: Status filter for apps with updates

data.name: Apps_SelectWithUpdates
data.comment: Button to select all apps with updates

data.name: Apps_NoUpdates
data.value: All applications are up to date
data.comment: Message when no updates are available

data.name: Recovery_CheckInternet
data.value: Check your internet connection and try again

data.name: Recovery_CheckFirewall
data.value: Ensure firewall or antivirus is not blocking the connection

data.name: Recovery_TryAgainLater
data.value: The server may be temporarily unavailable - try again later

data.name: Recovery_CheckPermissions
data.value: Check that you have permission to access the required files or folders
data.comment: Recovery suggestion for access denied errors

data.name: Recovery_CheckPath
data.value: Verify the file or folder path exists

data.name: Recovery_CheckPrerequisites
data.value: Make sure all prerequisites are installed (Winget, Chocolatey, PowerShell 7)

data.name: Recovery_ManualInstall
data.value: Consider installing the application manually from its official website

data.name: Recovery_CheckPowerShell
data.value: Check your PowerShell execution policy (Set-ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned)
data.comment: Recovery suggestion for PowerShell policy issues

data.name: Recovery_UpdatePowerShell
data.value: Update PowerShell to the latest version

data.name: Recovery_Generic_CheckLogs
data.value: Check the logs folder for more details
data.comment: Generic recovery suggestion to check logs

data.name: Dialog_ReportIssue
data.comment: Button to report issue on GitHub

data.name: Settings_ExportImport_Desc
data.value: Save or load your settings configuration

data.name: Settings_ExportFailed
data.comment: Error message for settings export failure

data.name: Settings_ImportFailed
data.comment: Error message for settings import failure

data.name: Settings_ResetDefaults_Desc
data.value: Reset all settings to their default values

data.name: Settings_ResetFailed
data.comment: Error message for settings reset failure

data.name: Confirm_ResetSettings_Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to their default values? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Logs_NoLogs_Hint
data.value: Log files will appear here after deployments

data.name: Confirm_ClearOldLogs_Message
data.value: Delete log files older than 7 days? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings_TimePlaceholder
data.comment: Time input placeholder for scheduled deployment

data.name: Apps_ProfileHelpTooltip
data.value: Select a profile to automatically select its applications. You can then modify the selection manually before installing.
data.comment: Help tooltip explaining profile selection workflow

data.name: Apps_SelectionHelpTooltip
data.value: Check the boxes to select applications for installation. Use filters to find specific applications.

data.name: Apps_NoProfilesAvailable
data.comment: Message when no deployment profiles exist

data.name: Apps_NoProfilesHint
data.value: Select applications manually or create a profile by selecting apps and clicking Save Profile.
data.comment: Hint text when no profiles exist

data.name: Dialog_SaveProfile_AppsSelected
data.comment: Number of apps selected in save dialog

data.name: Dialog_SaveProfile_CreateNew
data.comment: Option to create a new profile

data.name: Dialog_SaveProfile_NoApps
data.value: Please select at least one application

data.name: Profile_Apply_Title
data.comment: Title for profile apply conflict dialog

data.name: Profile_Apply_Message_HasManualSelection
data.value: You have {0} manually selected applications. Replace them with the "{1}" profile or merge?
data.comment: Message for profile apply conflict dialog. {0} = count of manually selected apps. {1} = name of the profile being applied.

data.name: Profile_Apply_Replace
data.comment: Replace current manual selection with the selected profile

data.name: Profile_Apply_Merge
data.comment: Merge selected profile applications into the current manual selection

data.name: Dashboard_Hero_Ready
data.comment: Hero status when system is ready

data.name: Dashboard_Hero_NeedPrereqs
data.comment: Hero status when prerequisites are missing

data.name: Dashboard_Hero_HasUpdates
data.comment: Hero status when updates are available

data.name: Dashboard_History_ViewAll
data.comment: Link to view full deployment history

data.name: Dashboard_LastCheck_JustNow
data.comment: Last check timestamp - less than 1 minute

data.name: Dashboard_Stats_ProfilesHint
data.value: Click to select a deployment profile

data.name: Dashboard_ScanBtn_Hint
data.value: Scan your installed applications for available updates

data.name: Dashboard_Nav_PrereqsHint
data.value: Verify and install required components (Winget, Chocolatey)

data.name: Dashboard_Nav_AppsHint
data.value: Browse, search, and manage application installations

data.name: Dashboard_StartDeployment_Hint
data.value: Start deploying your selected application profile

data.name: Dashboard_ViewUpdates_Hint
data.value: View and install available application updates

data.name: Common_TryAgain
data.comment: Retry button text for error recovery

data.name: Common_Dismiss
data.comment: Dismiss button text to close error messages

data.name: Common_Details
data.comment: Expandable details section header in error dialogs

data.name: Common_DryRun
data.comment: Dry run prefix for simulated installations

data.name: Accessibility_InstallationStarted
data.comment: Announcement when app installation starts (0=app name)

data.name: Accessibility_InstallationComplete
data.comment: Announcement when app installation completes (0=app name)

data.name: Accessibility_InstallationFailed
data.comment: Announcement when app installation fails (0=app name)

data.name: Accessibility_LiveRegion
data.comment: Accessible name for screen reader live region

data.name: Accessibility_SkipToContent
data.comment: Button text for skip-to-content accessibility link

data.name: Accessibility_SkippedToContent
data.comment: Screen reader announcement after skipping navigation

data.name: ScheduledDeployment_AdminRequired
data.value: Administrator privileges required to manage scheduled deployments. Please restart the application as administrator.
data.comment: Warning when admin rights are needed

data.name: ScheduledDeployment_CreateNew
data.comment: Section header for creating new scheduled deployment

data.name: ScheduledDeployment_Date
data.comment: Accessible name for the deployment date picker

data.name: ScheduledDeployment_Time
data.comment: Accessible name for the deployment time input

data.name: ScheduledDeployment_ConfirmRemove
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove this scheduled deployment?

data.name: Apps_ValidationFailed
data.comment: Error message when application validation fails

data.name: Apps_SaveFailed
data.comment: Error message when application save fails

data.name: Apps_FileNotFound
data.comment: Error message when import file not found

data.name: Apps_Error_InstallSingleFailed
data.comment: {0} = application name, {1} = exception message. WF-002 single-op error banner.

data.name: Apps_Error_UninstallSingleFailed
data.comment: {0} = application name, {1} = exception message. WF-002 single-op error banner.

data.name: Apps_Error_UpdateSingleFailed
data.comment: {0} = application name, {1} = exception message. WF-002 single-op error banner.

data.name: Apps_Toast_OpenWebsiteFailed
data.comment: {0} = application name, {1} = exception message. WF-002 AppActions toast warning.

data.name: Apps_Toast_CopyAppIdFailed
data.comment: {0} = exception message. WF-002 AppActions toast warning.

data.name: Validation_AtLeastOneSource
data.value: At least one installation source is required

data.name: Validation_DuplicateAppId
data.comment: Validation error for duplicate application ID

data.name: Nav_AppCatalog
data.comment: Navigation item for application catalog management

data.name: AppCatalog_Title
data.comment: Title of the application catalog view

data.name: AppCatalog_Subtitle
data.value: Manage application definitions and installation sources
data.comment: Subtitle of the application database view

data.name: AppCatalog_SearchHint
data.value: Search by ID, name, or tags...

data.name: AppCatalog_LoadError
data.comment: App Catalog load error message shown in the main content area

data.name: AppCatalog_EmptyDatabase
data.value: No applications in database. Add one to get started.
data.comment: App Catalog empty state when the database contains no applications

data.name: AppCatalog_EmptyFilter
data.value: No applications match the current filter. Try clearing it.
data.comment: App Catalog empty state when filters hide all loaded applications

data.name: AppCatalog_UndoTooltipFormat
data.comment: Undo button tooltip format with keyboard shortcut

data.name: AppCatalog_RedoTooltipFormat
data.comment: Redo button tooltip format with keyboard shortcut

data.name: AppCatalog_UndoTooltipDefault
data.comment: Default undo button tooltip when no action to undo

data.name: AppCatalog_RedoTooltipDefault
data.comment: Default redo button tooltip when no action to redo

data.name: AppCatalog_CopyIdSuffix
data.comment: Suffix appended to app ID when duplicating

data.name: AppCatalog_CopyNameSuffix
data.comment: Suffix appended to app name when duplicating

data.name: AppCatalog_DeleteConfirm
data.value:
Are you sure you want to delete '{0}' ({1})?
This action cannot be undone.

data.name: AppCatalog_EditorOwnerNotFound
data.value: Cannot open editor: Owner window not found.
data.comment: Error when editor cannot find parent window

data.name: AppCatalog_ImportModeConfirm
data.value: Choose how to handle existing applications.

data.name: AppCatalog_Import_Replace
data.comment: Import mode button to replace existing applications

data.name: AppCatalog_Import_Skip
data.comment: Import mode button to skip duplicate applications

data.name: AppCatalog_NoExportSelection
data.comment: Message when no apps selected for export

data.name: AppCatalog_VerifySources
data.comment: Context menu item to verify application sources

data.name: AppEditor_PriorityLabel
data.comment: Priority label shown next to slider

data.name: AppEditor_DetectionDescription
data.value: Configure how the application is detected on the system to check if it's already installed.

data.name: AppEditor_DetectionPath
data.value: Path (registry key, file path, or command)

data.name: AppEditor_DiscardChanges
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?

data.name: AppEditor_SourceSearchDescription
data.value: Search Winget, Chocolatey, or Microsoft Store and apply the selected package to this catalog entry.

data.name: AppEditor_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search package by name or ID...

data.name: SourceEditor_TestTooltip
data.value: Verify that the package exists in the repository

data.name: SourceEditor_TestPlaceholder
data.value: Package verification will be implemented in a future sprint

data.name: SourceEditor_TestUrlTooltip
data.value: Verify that the download URL is accessible

data.name: SourceEditor_UrlTestSuccess
data.comment: URL test success message with size and type

data.name: SourceEditor_UrlTestSuccessNoSize
data.comment: URL test success message without size

data.name: SourceEditor_UrlTestFailed
data.comment: URL test failed message with status code

data.name: Verify_WingetUnavailable
data.value: Winget is not available on this system

data.name: Verify_ChocoUnavailable
data.value: Chocolatey is not available on this system

data.name: Detection_Command_Hint
data.value: Command should return exit code 0 if application is installed

data.name: Detection_TestTooltip
data.value: Test if the application is detected on this system

data.name: Detection_StoreAppCheckNotSupported
data.comment: Store app check not supported message

data.name: AppCatalog_DeleteMultipleConfirm
data.value:
Are you sure you want to delete {0} applications?
This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Recovery_NetworkTimeout
data.value: The connection timed out. Try increasing timeout settings or check your network speed.

data.name: Recovery_DnsResolution
data.value: Could not resolve the server address. Check your DNS settings or try a different network.

data.name: Recovery_ProxySettings
data.value: If you're behind a proxy, verify your proxy settings are correctly configured.

data.name: Recovery_SslCertificate
data.value: There may be an SSL certificate issue. Check your system date/time and security software.

data.name: A11y_EmptyStateIcon
data.comment: Accessibility label for empty state icons

data.name: A11y_NoHistoryIcon
data.comment: Accessibility label for no history icon

data.name: A11y_NoDatabaseIcon
data.comment: Accessibility label for empty database icon

data.name: A11y_NoDeploymentIcon
data.comment: Accessibility label for no deployment icon

data.name: Help_Shortcut_DataGrid
data.value: In data grids, use Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to select, and Ctrl+A to select all.

data.name: Validation_Profile_Name_Length
data.value: Profile name must be between 1 and 128 characters

data.name: Validation_Profile_Name_Pattern
data.value: Profile name can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens

data.name: Validation_Profile_Version_Pattern
data.value: Version must be in format X.Y or X.Y.Z

data.name: Validation_Profile_InheritedFrom_MaxCount
data.value: Cannot inherit from more than 10 profiles

data.name: Validation_Profile_CircularInheritance
data.value: A profile cannot inherit from itself

data.name: Validation_Profile_DuplicateApps
data.value: Duplicate application IDs detected in profile

data.name: Validation_EditApp_Id_Pattern
data.value: ID must start with a letter or number and contain only letters, numbers, dots, dashes, and underscores

data.name: Validation_EditApp_Id_Length
data.value: ID must be between 2 and 128 characters

data.name: Validation_EditApp_Name_Length
data.value: Name must be between 1 and 256 characters

data.name: Validation_EditApp_Category_Length
data.value: Category must be between 1 and 64 characters

data.name: Validation_EditApp_Homepage_InvalidUrl
data.value: Homepage must be a valid URL

data.name: Validation_EditApp_Sources_Required
data.value: At least one installation source must be configured

data.name: Validation_Sources_Winget_MaxLength
data.value: Winget package ID must not exceed 256 characters

data.name: Validation_Sources_Chocolatey_MaxLength
data.value: Chocolatey package name must not exceed 256 characters

data.name: Validation_Sources_Store_Pattern
data.value: Store ID must be 12 alphanumeric characters

data.name: Validation_Sources_DirectUrl_InvalidUrl
data.value: Direct URL must be a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL

data.name: Validation_DirectDownload_InstallerType_Required
data.value: Installer type is required for direct download

data.name: Validation_SystemInfo_WindowsVersion_MaxLength
data.value: Windows version must not exceed 128 characters

data.name: Validation_SystemInfo_WindowsBuild_MaxLength
data.value: Windows build must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Validation_SystemInfo_WingetVersion_MaxLength
data.value: Winget version must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Validation_SystemInfo_ChocolateyVersion_MaxLength
data.value: Chocolatey version must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Validation_SystemInfo_TotalMemory_Range
data.value: Total memory must be between 0 and 10000 GB

data.name: Validation_SystemInfo_ProcessorCount_Range
data.value: Processor count must be between 1 and 1024

data.name: Validation_Scheduled_Id_Length
data.value: Deployment ID must be between 1 and 32 characters

data.name: Validation_Scheduled_ProfileName_Length
data.value: Profile name must be between 1 and 256 characters

data.name: Validation_Scheduled_CreatedBy_MaxLength
data.value: Created by must not exceed 256 characters

data.name: Validation_Scheduled_LastRunResult_MaxLength
data.value: Last run result must not exceed 256 characters

data.name: Validation_History_ProfileName_Length
data.value: Profile name must be between 1 and 128 characters

data.name: Validation_History_TotalApps_Range
data.value: Total apps must be between 0 and 10000

data.name: Validation_History_SuccessfulApps_Range
data.value: Successful apps must be between 0 and 10000

data.name: Validation_History_FailedApps_Range
data.value: Failed apps must be between 0 and 10000

data.name: Validation_History_SkippedApps_Range
data.value: Skipped apps must be between 0 and 10000

data.name: Validation_History_Duration_Range
data.value: Duration must be between 0 and 7 days

data.name: Validation_History_AppsSumExceedsTotal
data.value: Sum of successful, failed, and skipped apps cannot exceed total apps

data.name: Validation_History_FutureDate
data.value: Deployment date cannot be in the future

data.name: Validation_History_SuccessWithFailedApps
data.value: Success result cannot have failed apps

data.name: Validation_History_FailedAllSuccessful
data.value: Failed result cannot have all apps successful

data.name: Validation_Prereq_Name_Length
data.value: Name must be between 1 and 128 characters

data.name: Validation_Prereq_PSVersion_MaxLength
data.value: PowerShell version must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Validation_Prereq_ChocoVersion_MaxLength
data.value: Chocolatey version must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Validation_Prereq_WingetVersion_MaxLength
data.value: Winget version must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Validation_Prereq_DotNetFrameworkVersion_MaxLength
data.value: .NET Framework version must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Validation_Prereq_VCRedistVersion_MaxLength
data.value: VC++ version must not exceed 128 characters

data.name: Validation_Prereq_JavaVersion_MaxLength
data.value: Java version must not exceed 128 characters

data.name: Validation_SemanticVersion_Invalid
data.value: The value must be a valid version number (e.g., 1.0.0, 2.1.3-beta).

data.name: A11y_Logs_ViewLog
data.comment: Accessibility name for log view button

data.name: A11y_Logs_CopyPath
data.comment: Accessibility name for copy log path button

data.name: A11y_Logs_DeleteLog
data.comment: Accessibility name for delete log button

data.name: A11y_Logs_Search
data.comment: Accessibility name for log search field

data.name: A11y_Logs_LevelFilter
data.comment: Accessibility name for log level filter

data.name: A11y_Logs_ClearFilters
data.comment: Accessibility name for clear filters button

data.name: A11y_Logs_ClearOld
data.comment: Accessibility name for clear old logs button

data.name: A11y_Deployment_Cancel
data.comment: Accessibility name for cancel deployment button

data.name: A11y_Deployment_CopyLogs
data.comment: Accessibility name for copy logs button

data.name: A11y_Deployment_CloseLogs
data.comment: Accessibility name for close log viewer button

data.name: A11y_Dashboard_StartDeployment
data.comment: Accessibility name for start deployment button

data.name: A11y_Dashboard_ViewUpdates
data.comment: Accessibility name for view updates button

data.name: A11y_Dashboard_FixPrereqs
data.comment: Accessibility name for fix prerequisites button

data.name: A11y_Settings_ReducedMotion
data.comment: Accessibility name for reduced motion toggle

data.name: A11y_Settings_HighContrast
data.comment: Accessibility name for high contrast toggle

data.name: A11y_Profile_Overwrite
data.comment: Accessibility name for overwrite radio button

data.name: A11y_Profile_SaveNew
data.comment: Accessibility name for save as new radio button

data.name: A11y_Profile_Name
data.comment: Accessibility name for profile name field

data.name: A11y_Profile_Parent
data.comment: Accessibility name for parent profile selector

data.name: A11y_Profile_Description
data.comment: Accessibility name for profile description field

data.name: A11y_Profile_Cancel
data.comment: Accessibility name for cancel button in profile dialog

data.name: A11y_Profile_Save
data.comment: Accessibility name for save profile button

data.name: A11y_AppPicker_Search
data.comment: Accessibility name for app picker search field

data.name: A11y_AppPicker_Cancel
data.comment: Accessibility name for cancel button in app picker

data.name: A11y_AppPicker_Add
data.comment: Accessibility name for add button in app picker

data.name: A11y_Onboarding_DontShow
data.comment: Accessibility name for dont show again checkbox

data.name: A11y_Onboarding_GetStarted
data.comment: Accessibility name for get started button

data.name: A11y_Shortcuts_Close
data.comment: Accessibility name for close shortcuts button

data.name: Error_LoadViewFailed
data.comment: Error message when a view fails to load (0=error message)

data.name: Detection_InvalidExpandedPath
data.value: Invalid path after environment variable expansion
data.comment: Error when expanded path is invalid

data.name: Detection_InvalidCommandPath
data.value: Invalid command path: contains potentially dangerous characters
data.comment: Error when command path contains dangerous characters

data.name: Detection_CommandTimeout
data.comment: Error when detection command times out

data.name: A11y_Search_SuggestionsHelp
data.value: Type to filter applications. Use arrow keys to navigate suggestions.
data.comment: Accessibility help text for search suggestions list

data.name: A11y_Main_NavDashboard
data.comment: Accessibility help text for dashboard navigation item

data.name: A11y_Main_NavPrerequisites
data.comment: Accessibility help text for prerequisites navigation item

data.name: A11y_Main_NavApps
data.comment: Accessibility help text for apps navigation item

data.name: A11y_Main_NavDeployment
data.comment: Accessibility help text for deployment navigation item

data.name: A11y_Main_NavSettings
data.comment: Accessibility help text for settings navigation item

data.name: A11y_Main_NavAppDatabase
data.value: Navigate to Application Database view, Ctrl+6
data.comment: Accessibility help text for app database navigation item

data.name: A11y_Deployment_AppList
data.comment: Accessibility name for deployment applications grid

data.name: A11y_Applications_DbGrid
data.comment: Accessibility name for applications database grid

data.comment: Accessibility help text for dashboard profiles card

data.name: A11y_Dashboard_AppsCard
data.comment: Accessibility help text for dashboard applications card

data.name: A11y_Dashboard_UpdatesCard
data.comment: Accessibility help text for dashboard updates card

data.name: A11y_Loading_ContentHelp
data.value: Content is being loaded, please wait
data.comment: Accessibility help text for loading placeholders
